message:
fix(clippy): resolve all clippy warnings across frankenterm-core all-targets

Fixes across 36 files:
- Clone on Copy types: replace .clone() with direct copy for Copy-implementing enums
- Unnested or-patterns in ipc.rs match arms
- Approximate PI values → std::f64::consts::PI
- Single-char bindings → #[allow(clippy::many_single_char_names)] for graph tests
- #[should_panic] without reason → add expected= strings
- If-chain → match with Ordering
- io::Error::new(Other, ..) → io::Error::other(..)
- Manual RangeInclusive::contains → (30..=90).contains()
- Strict f32/f64 comparison → epsilon-based comparison
- Similar binding names (hasher/hashes) → rename to hash_state
- Empty string manually → String::new()
- Manual slice copy → copy_from_slice
- Borrowed expression for impl Into<T> → pass owned
- Multiply-add → mul_add
- Manual midpoint → f64::midpoint
- Wildcard match for single variant → explicit variant
- Length comparison to zero → extracted with #[allow]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -906,7 +906,7 @@ proptest! {
         let fc = ResourceForecast {
             metric_name: "test".into(),
             horizon_steps: 5,
-            point_estimate: (lower + upper) / 2.0,
+            point_estimate: f64::midpoint(lower, upper),
             lower_bound: lower,
             upper_bound: upper,
             coverage: 0.95,
